calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Sep-08-2015 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kelly Dixon for (petitioners) Tracy Burris & Oliver Harrison, Jr.

The Court asked if there was anything further to report. Ms. Dixon stated that she had filed a memorandum of points and authorities in support of the petition, that there is nothing further to report, that this was an administrative step that the petitioner's mother omitted, that they are trying to clear title efficiently, that they are appealing to the courts equitable authority otherwise they will have to probate their father's estate for a property of small value and that the family does not have the funds. The Court stated that this is not something the court can do and the petition for spousal property was denied.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado: Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)
